description:
Term::Call / Term::TailCall native branches (ir_codegen.rs:2244+, 2336+) replace `native_args = arg_vals.clone()` with per-arg coerce against `fn_sigs[callee_sid].params[i]`. Closure stubs (.29.5) at line ~2787 also coerce per their target callee sig.

Caller's `Const::Int(n)` lowering may produce a raw `iconst.i64 n` when the receiving param is raw int (peephole; not load-bearing — Cranelift folds the tag-then-untag at codegen, but raw is cleaner).
title: VR.4 follow-up STEP.4: Direct call sites use coerce helper
